scripts.build: yarn workspace json-as-xlsx build && yarn workspace demo-reactjs build
scripts.static: cp -R packages/demo-reactjs/build/ build/ && cp CNAME build/CNAME

comments.resolutions: Jest coverage still requests babel-plugin-istanbul ^7.0.1. Keep this resolution until Jest's dependency range accepts v8, so Yarn can install the current version and `yarn outdated` stays clean.
